subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath ordained imprisonment for Himself through a wisdom none but His own all-prevailing Self can comprehend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی قدر لنفسه السجن بالحکمه التی مااطلع بها الا نفسه المهیمنه علی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
